title: Modern Dynamics [Dark Mode]
description: Dark models and textures for the Modern Dynamics mod, Original mod by Technici4n.
body:
![Modern Dynamics [Dark Mode] Hero Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2541f3bd50d45b055ea15710540db736d8e276d2.png)

### Modern Dynamics [Dark Mode]

Modern Dynamics [Dark Mode] is a resource pack that recolors item pipes and several textures from the [Modern Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-dynamics) mod to a darker, sleeker aesthetic. This pack is perfect for players who prefer a darker theme and want a more cohesive look for their Modern Dynamics machinery and items.

**Features:**
- Recolored item pipes for a darker appearance.
- Darkened textures for various Modern Dynamics components.
- Maintains the original functionality while providing a new visual style.

![In-game Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087e2d6bbea39ba110ed3dd8c2aa7d7ba787304a.jpeg)

**How to Install:**
1. Download the resource pack.
2. Place the `.zip` file in the `resourcepacks` folder located in your Minecraft directory.
3. Launch Minecraft and select the resource pack in the resource packs menu.

Make sure to have the [Modern Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-dynamics) mod installed for this resource pack to work properly.

Enjoy a new, darker look for your Modern Dynamics setups!

![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b442764bcd2a2081f27c977dfdf584e8a2027de0.png)

**Attribution:**

The original textures and models are from the [Modern Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-dynamics) mod, created by [Technici4n](https://modrinth.com/user/Technici4n).
